hero.title: Hi, my name is
hero.description1: Front-end developer passionate about clean design, scalable architectures, and crafting pixel-perfect interfaces.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I’m a front-end developer who loves turning complex problems into simple, elegant interfaces. My toolkit centers around React, Sass, modern JavaScript frameworks, and a deep appreciation for design systems.
about.paragraph2: As a former bookseller, I discovered web development through an OpenClassrooms course, where I realized that my artistic eye and logical technique formed a powerful duo.
about.paragraph3: When I’m not coding, you’ll find me exploring new design trends, contributing to open-source projects, or refining my workflow to stay sharp and efficient.
about.paragraph4: My background in <0>literature and journalism</0> also shaped the way I work: with curiosity, attention to detail, and a strong focus on clarity and communication.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Over the course of my training and personal projects, I’ve built a solid front-end foundation with a strong focus on clean code, reusable components, and user-friendly interfaces.

soft.title: Soft skills
soft.subtitle: What I bring to the table beyond code

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects that helped me strengthen my front-end and back-end skills through concrete, hands-on development challenges.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a project in mind or an opportunity to discuss? Feel free to reach out.

form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, your opportunity, or just say hello...

success.message: Thanks for your message. I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
